title: Review and fix Google Analytics implementation

requirements.text: Verify that Google Analytics tracking code is properly installed in the frontend HTML with correct GA4 tracking ID format (G-XXXXXXXXXX)

quotes: You can check but make sure No effect will be for user

acceptanceCriteria: Google Analytics tracking code exists in frontend/index.html
Tracking code is placed in the correct location (head section)

requirements.text: Ensure the tracking implementation includes the full HTTPS URL format for the Internet Computer deployment domain
acceptanceCriteria: Google Analytics configuration includes proper domain settings
Internet Computer canister URL format is correctly handled

requirements.text: Verify that no user-visible UI elements or functionality are affected by the Analytics implementation review

quotes: make sure No effect will be for user

acceptanceCriteria: No changes to any UI components or layouts
No changes to user interactions or functionality
Analytics code runs silently in the background
Application behavior remains identical to current version

constraints: Do not modify any user-facing UI components or functionality
Do not change application behavior or user experience
Only review and fix Analytics tracking implementation
Maintain all existing features exactly as they are
nonGoals: Adding new analytics features or dashboards
